flows.name: Corpus anomaly -> Research Strategist -> candidate direction
flows.downstreamConsumption: candidate-domain-priority consumes Corpus graph export and Research Strategist output.

wiringProofs.notes: The priority bridge records the corpus graph export before selecting a candidate direction.
The priority bridge is written only after Strategy output is consumed.

flows.notes: Strategy ranking changes the next candidate direction without claiming discovery.

flows.name: HardSeed -> MechanismRouter -> Domain Pack execution
flows.downstreamConsumption: MechanismPlanExecution records selected domain-pack output refs.

wiringProofs.notes: The smoke contract preserves the hard-seed proof shape before router execution.
The persisted plan artifact is read back and consumed by the executor.

flows.name: Tool acquisition -> Computational Scientist pipeline -> evidence package
flows.downstreamConsumption: Lab and Science outputs are bound into an evidence package contract.

wiringProofs.notes: Lab output is embedded in the evidence package contract.
Science output is embedded in the evidence package contract.

flows.notes: Tool acquisition is explicitly not a discovery Fund.

flows.name: Repo target -> repo reproduction -> replay/package/corpus
flows.downstreamConsumption: Repo reproduction output is joined to replay and corpus-audit readiness.

flows.notes: Long-horizon and replay caveats are preserved.

flows.name: Candidate -> Nobel-readiness gates -> FundCandidateDraft or graveyard
flows.downstreamConsumption: Candidate disposition fails closed to graveyard without a real gate-passing candidate.

wiringProofs.notes: Readiness criteria are consumed before candidate disposition is written.
The current FundCandidateDraft contract is validated in-memory and consumed by the disposition guard without promotion.
The unchanged Fund Gate fails closed for an empty candidate; no FundCandidateDraft is promoted.

flows.notes: No FUND_FOUND can be emitted without the unchanged Fund Gate passing.

flows.name: Evidence package -> replay -> corpus status
flows.downstreamConsumption: Replay coverage and route package manifest are bound to corpus audit status.

wiringProofs.notes: Replay coverage is consumed by the package/replay/corpus contract.
Corpus site audit counts as wired only when the local corpus target is available and the audit artifact is consumed.

flows.notes: No corpus publication is performed by the smoke flow.

flows.name: Knowledge Engine output -> next candidate/domain priority
flows.downstreamConsumption: Knowledge claim graph and strategy ranking choose the next candidate/domain priority.

wiringProofs.notes: The priority bridge is written only after Knowledge output is consumed.
Strategy and Knowledge are combined into one downstream priority contract.

flows.notes: Priority is a candidate direction, not a discovery claim.
